rag_rules: Generate AGREE annex blocks inside `annex agree {** ... **};` for component types or implementations as appropriate
Use `assume`, `guarantee`, `eq`, `const`, and `assign` only when they are valid in the current scope
For implementation contracts, use `assign` only for existing output features or auxiliary variables
For type contracts, place input assumptions and output guarantees only when concrete bounds or visible relations are available
Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless the model exposes explicit typed ports or constants
generic_rules: Use exact current-case names from the model index for all identifiers
Treat each annex agree block as scoped to its owning component declaration
Do not copy identifiers from examples or invent ports/components
Use case-provided thresholds and legal visible feature names for bounds
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Implementation contracts use `assign` for outputs or auxiliary variables
Type contracts use assumptions for inputs and guarantees for outputs
anti_patterns: Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions without explicit ports or constants
Do not invent identifiers or copy from examples
